ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or division of the team (e.g., West I, West II) */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the team captain */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_away_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match took place */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season to which the match belongs */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_home_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_away_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_away_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the team in the standings */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Total matches played */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Total matches won */,
  "drawn" INTEGER /* Total matches drawn */,
  "lost" INTEGER /* Total matches lost */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for minus goals against) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes related to the team standing */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season to which the standings belong */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the standings were last updated */,
  "playoff_status" INTEGER /* Whether the team has qualified for the playoffs */,
  "promotion_status" INTEGER /* Whether the team has been promoted to a higher division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "current_season" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the season is currently active */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the season */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the season */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Manager, Coach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
